'''''Pelagia''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] troopship under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tekba]] during [[Operation Shadow Hand]].<ref name="EE" />

==Characteristics==
It was an old hulk by the standards of its captain, who estimated that his vessel required about half an hour to reach [[Lightspeed/Legends|lightspeed]].<ref name="EE" />

==History==
It was carrying 100,000 soldiers, as well as their ground equipment and armor, to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] to aid in the besieging of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Imperial shipyard|shipyard]]<ref name="EE" /> in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].<ref name="Date" />

The ship was linking up with a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] flight group based out of the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ottega system]] when Captain Tekba received word from [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] that it was going to be hit by a missile, shot from [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Galaxy Gun]].<ref name="EE" />

When Tekba brought up that the craft couldn't escape in time, Calrissian urged him to attempt to destroy it. Despite its fighters and defensive guns putting up a valiant effort, the missile still hit ''Pelagia'' and [[Destruction of the Pelagia|destroyed]] the vessel, along with its crew and passengers.<ref name="EE" />
It was another triumph of Palpatine, who had already destroyed at least one troopship before her.<ref name="SW:DEa" />

==Appearances==
*[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]]
